site.title: Wayfinding & Directional Signs | ION Print & Promo
site.description: For your busy facility, campus, event or outdoor space, get clear wayfinding & directional signs & decals from ION Print & Promo.

centreText.title: Clear Signs, Better Flow
centreText.description: Clear wayfinding gets visitors where they need to go. It reduces confusion, improves flow & creates a more professional experience for everyone entering your space.

features.title: Interior Wayfinding & Room Identification
features.description:
Help visitors find their way with ease! We create clean, easy-to-read signage that keeps buildings organized & easy to navigate. Ideal for offices, schools, healthcare facilities, community spaces & more.

  • Directional signs & arrows
  • Room identification signs
  • Office & department signage
  • Washroom & accessibility signage
  • Floor & wall decals

With ION Print & Promo, you can expect fast production times, durable materials, clean professional designs & friendly, local service.

features.title: Smarter Wayfinding For High-Traffic Spaces
features.description:
When the space is big, visitors can get really lost! For larger properties, signage needs to work as a system, not just individual signs. We help create consistent wayfinding across all types of spaces, indoor & out.

  • Coordinated wayfinding systems
  • Building directories & navigation signage
  • Campus & multi-area signage plans
  • ADA & compliance signage

Clear systems improve flow, reduce confusion & create a more professional experience.

features.title: Outdoor Directional & Event Signage
features.description:
Guide traffic, parking & event flow with great signage. Outdoor signs play a key role in guiding visitors before they even enter your space.

  • Parking & entrance signs
  • Directional arrows & site signage
  • Event, golf & festival wayfinding
  • Temporary coroplast signs

We produce durable signage designed for visibility in all conditions, including our Canadian winters.
